chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ مَمْلُوكَ غَيْرِهِ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The free man kills a slave of someone else, or injures him, and the slave kills the free or injures him

text: إِذَا قَتَلَ الْحُرُّ الْعَبْدَ غُرِّمَ قِيمَتَهُ وَ أُدِّبَ قِيلَ فَإِنْ كَانَتْ قِيمَتُهُ عِشْرِينَ أَلْفَ دِرْهَمٍ قَالَ لَا يُجَاوَزُ بِقِيمَةِ عَبْدٍ دِيَةَ الْأَحْرَارِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the free kills the slave, he would be fined his value, and be disciplined, so even if his value was twenty thousand Dirhams’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not allowed for the value of a slave to exceed the wergild of the free ones’.
